g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the mobile app UI layer')
sendPrompt('How does the chat interface connect to the LLM?')
sendPrompt('How does image capture feed into OCR and vision?')
sendPrompt('What does the PDF and manual browser look like?')
sendPrompt('What features are locked behind premium?')
sendPrompt('How does the app detect online vs offline and route requests?')
sendPrompt('Which on-device LLMs work best for veterinary use?')
sendPrompt('How is the local vector database structured?')
sendPrompt('How does offline OCR work with ML Kit?')
sendPrompt('Which cloud LLM APIs are recommended for vet queries?')
sendPrompt('How is the cloud vector database set up?')
sendPrompt('How does vision AI handle X-rays and lesion images?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI backend handle?')
sendPrompt('How does the PDF ingestion pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('How is WikiVet scraped and indexed?')
sendPrompt('How are documents chunked and embedded?')
sendPrompt('How are indexed chunks synced to mobile devices?')

svg.text: Click any component to learn more
